components.name: auth-register
components.purpose: Handle user sign-up, password hashing, account creation

components.name: alpaca-client
components.purpose: Initialise authenticated Alpaca SDK instance per user

components.name: alpaca-portfolio
components.purpose: Fetch user holdings and positions from Alpaca

components.name: alpaca-dividends
components.purpose: Detect dividend activity from Alpaca account history

components.name: alpaca-orders
components.purpose: Place and track reinvestment buy orders via Alpaca

components.name: rules-engine
components.purpose: Evaluate user rules to decide whether/how to reinvest a dividend

components.name: drip-scheduler
components.purpose: Celery periodic task: poll for new dividends, trigger reinvestment

components.name: api-users
components.purpose: REST endpoints: get/update user profile and Alpaca credentials

components.name: api-portfolio
components.purpose: REST endpoints: holdings, dividend history, reinvestment log

components.name: api-rules
components.purpose: REST endpoints: CRUD for user reinvestment rules

components.name: db-models
components.purpose: SQLAlchemy ORM models: User, AlpacaCredential, Rule, ReinvestmentLog

components.name: db-session
components.purpose: Database connection pool and session factory

components.name: frontend-dashboard
components.purpose: Portfolio overview, dividend history, reinvestment log

components.name: frontend-api-client
components.purpose: Typed fetch wrapper for all backend API calls
